sql: SELECT c1.is_active, c1.expiry_date FROM cards AS c1 ORDER BY c1.card_number LIMIT 87

SELECT * FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.status LIKE '%c'
SELECT l1.principal_amount, l1.status, l1.term_months FROM loans AS l1
SELECT * FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.id <> 657 ORDER BY a1.currency LIMIT 79
SELECT b1.id, b1.city FROM branches AS b1 ORDER BY b1.state
SELECT a1.interest_rate, a1.id, a1.is_active FROM accounts AS a1 LIMIT 9
SELECT a1.customer_id, a1.interest_rate FROM accounts AS a1
SELECT a1.opened_on FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.balance > 707 ORDER BY a1.currency
SELECT t1.from_account_id, t1.status FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.description LIKE '%c'
SELECT * FROM employees AS e1
SELECT c1.is_active, c1.account_id, c1.card_number, c1.card_type FROM cards AS c1
SELECT * FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.balance < 273 LIMIT 18
SELECT l1.monthly_payment FROM loans AS l1
SELECT t1.description, t1.to_account_id, t1.id, t1.status FROM transactions AS t1 ORDER BY t1.status
SELECT * FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.customer_id = 862
SELECT c1.id, c1.is_active, c1.first_name, c1.date_of_birth FROM customers AS c1 WHERE c1.first_name = 'test' ORDER BY c1.email
SELECT * FROM cards AS c1
SELECT * FROM branches AS b1 ORDER BY b1.state
SELECT b1.manager_id, b1.city FROM branches AS b1
SELECT * FROM accounts AS a1
SELECT * FROM transactions AS t1 ORDER BY t1.to_account_id
SELECT c1.credit_limit, c1.id FROM cards AS c1 WHERE c1.issued_on < DATETIME('now', '-8 days')
SELECT a1.opened_on, a1.balance FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.is_active = 0
SELECT * FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.city LIKE 'b%' ORDER BY b1.city
SELECT e1.salary, e1.branch_id, e1.first_name, e1.id FROM employees AS e1 WHERE e1.hire_date > DATETIME('now', '-17 days') LIMIT 75
SELECT t1.to_account_id, t1.transaction_date, t1.status FROM transactions AS t1 LIMIT 60
SELECT * FROM branches AS b1 ORDER BY b1.employee_count
SELECT l1.principal_amount, l1.start_date, l1.end_date, l1.monthly_payment FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.monthly_payment <= 912 ORDER BY l1.status
SELECT t1.to_account_id, t1.transaction_date, t1.status FROM transactions AS t1
SELECT c1.id, c1.account_id, a6.opened_on, c1.card_type FROM cards AS c1 INNER JOIN accounts AS a6 ON c1.account_id = a6.id WHERE a6.balance >= 877
SELECT t1.transaction_date, t1.transaction_type, t1.description, t1.status FROM transactions AS t1 FULL JOIN accounts AS a7 ON t1.to_account_id = a7.id WHERE a7.id <= 911
SELECT a7.id, t1.description, t1.to_account_id, t1.transaction_type FROM transactions AS t1 FULL JOIN accounts AS a7 ON t1.to_account_id = a7.id
SELECT a1.account_type, c4.id FROM accounts AS a1 INNER JOIN cards AS c4 ON a1.id = c4.account_id
SELECT c5.phone, c5.id, l1.status, c5.created_at FROM loans AS l1 INNER JOIN customers AS c5 ON l1.customer_id = c5.id WHERE c5.created_at <= DATETIME('now', '-21 days')
SELECT c1.is_active, a1.balance, c1.credit_limit, a1.account_type FROM cards AS c1 INNER JOIN accounts AS a1 ON c1.account_id = a1.id WHERE a1.is_active = 0
SELECT b1.is_active, b1.id, b1.manager_id, b1.name FROM branches AS b1 RIGHT JOIN employees AS e9 ON b1.id = e9.branch_id
SELECT c2.date_of_birth, l1.id, c2.address, c2.id FROM loans AS l1 LEFT JOIN customers AS c2 ON l1.customer_id = c2.id WHERE c2.email <> 'user48@example.com'
SELECT c3.credit_score, c3.first_name, l1.start_date, l1.term_months FROM loans AS l1 RIGHT JOIN customers AS c3 ON l1.customer_id = c3.id WHERE c3.is_active = 0
SELECT * FROM accounts AS a1 RIGHT JOIN cards AS c2 ON a1.id = c2.account_id
SELECT t1.status, a1.opened_on, t1.transaction_date, t1.amount FROM transactions AS t1 LEFT JOIN accounts AS a1 ON t1.to_account_id = a1.id WHERE a1.id <= 636
SELECT a1.interest_rate, c3.is_active, c3.account_id, a1.customer_id FROM accounts AS a1 FULL JOIN cards AS c3 ON a1.id = c3.account_id
SELECT * FROM branches AS b1 LEFT JOIN employees AS e5 ON b1.id = e5.branch_id
SELECT a4.opened_on, a4.account_type, a4.balance, c1.is_active FROM cards AS c1 LEFT JOIN accounts AS a4 ON c1.account_id = a4.id
SELECT * FROM branches AS b1 RIGHT JOIN employees AS e3 ON b1.id = e3.branch_id WHERE e3.position = 'user'
SELECT a1.interest_rate, c9.id, a1.balance FROM accounts AS a1 LEFT JOIN customers AS c9 ON a1.customer_id = c9.id WHERE c9.is_active = 0
SELECT b4.id, e1.hire_date, e1.first_name, b4.state FROM employees AS e1 INNER JOIN branches AS b4 ON e1.branch_id = b4.id WHERE b4.state = 'activity'
SELECT * FROM transactions AS t1 LEFT JOIN accounts AS a5 ON t1.to_account_id = a5.id
SELECT * FROM cards AS c1 FULL JOIN accounts AS a6 ON c1.account_id = a6.id WHERE a6.id <= 465
SELECT * FROM cards AS c1 LEFT JOIN accounts AS a6 ON c1.account_id = a6.id
SELECT * FROM customers AS c1 FULL JOIN accounts AS a6 ON c1.id = a6.customer_id WHERE a6.opened_on > DATETIME('now', '-10 days')
SELECT * FROM loans AS l1 RIGHT JOIN customers AS c2 ON l1.customer_id = c2.id WHERE c2.first_name LIKE '%c'
SELECT * FROM branches AS b1 INNER JOIN employees AS e6 ON b1.id = e6.branch_id
SELECT b5.id, b5.state, e1.hire_date, b5.employee_count FROM employees AS e1 RIGHT JOIN branches AS b5 ON e1.branch_id = b5.id
SELECT l1.is_active, c9.first_name, l1.status, l1.end_date FROM loans AS l1 FULL JOIN customers AS c9 ON l1.customer_id = c9.id WHERE c9.phone = 'admin'
SELECT t1.description, a7.currency, a7.opened_on, a7.balance FROM transactions AS t1 INNER JOIN accounts AS a7 ON t1.to_account_id = a7.id WHERE a7.is_active = 1
SELECT e1.is_active, b8.name, b8.city, e1.id FROM employees AS e1 RIGHT JOIN branches AS b8 ON e1.branch_id = b8.id WHERE b8.id = 205
SELECT a1.is_active, c8.email, a1.id, a1.currency FROM accounts AS a1 FULL JOIN customers AS c8 ON a1.customer_id = c8.id WHERE c8.id < 862
SELECT b1.state, e1.first_name, e1.hire_date, b1.city FROM employees AS e1 INNER JOIN branches AS b1 ON e1.branch_id = b1.id WHERE b1.name <> 'admin'
SELECT c1.email, a1.customer_id FROM customers AS c1 INNER JOIN accounts AS a1 ON c1.id = a1.customer_id WHERE a1.account_type LIKE '%a%'
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM branches AS inner_branches WHERE inner_branches.employee_count <> 778) AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.is_active = 0
SELECT a1.is_active, a1.opened_on, a1.customer_id, a1.balance FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM customers AS sub_c WHERE sub_c.id = a1.customer_id AND sub_c.credit_score <= 309)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM loans AS inner_loans WHERE inner_loans.is_active = 1) AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.start_date < DATETIME('now', '-27 days')
SELECT e1.hire_date FROM employees AS e1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM branches AS sub_b WHERE sub_b.id = e1.branch_id AND sub_b.city LIKE 'b%')
SELECT a1.interest_rate, a1.account_type, a1.id, a1.balance FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.id IN (SELECT sub_t.to_account_id FROM transactions AS sub_t WHERE sub_t.from_account_id = 963)
SELECT l1.id, l1.customer_id, l1.loan_type FROM loans AS l1 JOIN loans AS l2 ON l1.customer_id = l2.customer_id AND l1.id <> l2.id
SELECT c1.id, c1.account_id, c1.card_type FROM cards AS c1 JOIN cards AS c2 ON c1.account_id = c2.account_id AND c1.id <> c2.id
SELECT l1.monthly_payment, l1.is_active, l1.loan_type, l1.interest_rate FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.customer_id IN (SELECT sub_c.id FROM customers AS sub_c WHERE sub_c.is_active = 0)
SELECT c1.created_at FROM customers AS c1 WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM loans AS sub_l WHERE sub_l.customer_id = c1.id AND sub_l.loan_type <> 'user')
SELECT * FROM customers AS c1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM loans AS sub_l WHERE sub_l.customer_id = c1.id AND sub_l.customer_id = 642)
SELECT * FROM customers AS c1 WHERE c1.id IN (SELECT sub_a.customer_id FROM accounts AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.balance >= 161)
SELECT t1.id, t1.from_account_id, t1.to_account_id FROM transactions AS t1 JOIN transactions AS t2 ON t1.from_account_id = t2.from_account_id AND t1.id <> t2.id LIMIT 10
SELECT c1.id FROM customers AS c1 WHERE c1.id IN (SELECT sub_l.customer_id FROM loans AS sub_l WHERE sub_l.end_date <= DATETIME('now', '-27 days'))
SELECT e1.first_name, e1.last_name, e1.branch_id FROM employees AS e1 JOIN employees AS e2 ON e1.branch_id = e2.branch_id AND e1.id <> e2.id
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM loans AS inner_loans WHERE inner_loans.term_months > 748) AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.id <> 560
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM transactions AS inner_transactions WHERE inner_transactions.status = 'user') AS derived_table
SELECT c1.credit_limit FROM cards AS c1 WHERE c1.account_id IN (SELECT sub_a.id FROM accounts AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.opened_on < DATETIME('now', '-4 days'))
SELECT * FROM loans AS l1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM customers AS sub_c WHERE sub_c.id = l1.customer_id AND sub_c.date_of_birth < DATETIME('now', '-23 days'))
SELECT l1.id, l1.customer_id, l1.loan_type FROM loans AS l1 JOIN loans AS l2 ON l1.customer_id = l2.customer_id AND l1.id <> l2.id
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM branches AS inner_branches WHERE inner_branches.employee_count < 998) AS derived_table
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM transactions AS inner_transactions WHERE inner_transactions.transaction_date < DATETIME('now', '-12 days')) AS derived_table
SELECT c1.address FROM customers AS c1 WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM loans AS sub_l WHERE sub_l.customer_id = c1.id AND sub_l.customer_id > 412)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM loans AS inner_loans WHERE inner_loans.loan_type LIKE 'b%') AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.loan_type = 'user'
SELECT * FROM cards AS c1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM accounts AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.id = c1.account_id AND sub_a.opened_on >= DATETIME('now', '-25 days'))
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM transactions AS inner_transactions WHERE inner_transactions.description = 'user') AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.transaction_type <> '123'
SELECT t1.amount, t1.from_account_id FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.to_account_id IN (SELECT sub_a.id FROM accounts AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.is_active = 1)
SELECT e1.branch_id FROM employees AS e1 WHERE e1.branch_id IN (SELECT sub_b.id FROM branches AS sub_b WHERE sub_b.state <> 'admin')
SELECT e1.last_name, e1.is_active, e1.id FROM employees AS e1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM branches AS sub_b WHERE sub_b.id = e1.branch_id AND sub_b.id <> 972)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM employees AS inner_employees WHERE inner_employees.is_active = 1) AS derived_table
SELECT c1.id, c1.address, c1.created_at FROM customers AS c1 WHERE c1.id IN (SELECT sub_l.customer_id FROM loans AS sub_l WHERE sub_l.status = 'test')
SELECT e1.branch_id, e1.first_name FROM employees AS e1 WHERE e1.branch_id = 510 UNION SELECT e2.branch_id, e2.first_name FROM employees AS e2 WHERE e2.salary > 13 ORDER BY branch_id

SELECT t1.to_account_id, t1.status, t1.description FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.amount < 891 UNION ALL SELECT t2.to_account_id, t2.status, t2.description FROM transactions AS t2 WHERE t2.to_account_id < 373 ORDER BY to_account_id

SELECT t1.transaction_type, t1.description, t1.status, t1.amount FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.status LIKE '%a%' UNION ALL SELECT t2.transaction_type, t2.description, t2.status, t2.amount FROM transactions AS t2 WHERE t2.transaction_date < DATETIME('now', '-11 days') LIMIT 40

SELECT a1.opened_on, a1.currency, a1.interest_rate, a1.customer_id FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.balance > 345 UNION ALL SELECT a2.opened_on, a2.currency, a2.interest_rate, a2.customer_id FROM accounts AS a2 WHERE a2.id < 968
SELECT b1.city, b1.manager_id FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.is_active = 1 UNION SELECT b2.city, b2.manager_id FROM branches AS b2 WHERE b2.is_active = 1
SELECT b1.employee_count, b1.id, b1.name FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.is_active = 1 UNION ALL SELECT b2.employee_count, b2.id, b2.name FROM branches AS b2 WHERE b2.employee_count >= 772 LIMIT 47
SELECT c1.card_type, c1.account_id FROM cards AS c1 WHERE c1.card_number <> 'activity' UNION SELECT c2.card_type, c2.account_id FROM cards AS c2 WHERE c2.is_active = 1 ORDER BY card_type LIMIT 20

SELECT t1.status, t1.amount, t1.transaction_type FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.transaction_type LIKE '%a%' UNION SELECT t2.status, t2.amount, t2.transaction_type FROM transactions AS t2 WHERE t2.description LIKE '%a%'

SELECT l1.status, l1.term_months, l1.customer_id, l1.monthly_payment FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.status <> 'activity' UNION ALL SELECT l2.status, l2.term_months, l2.customer_id, l2.monthly_payment FROM loans AS l2 WHERE l2.loan_type <> 'user'
SELECT a1.currency, a1.is_active, a1.id FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.id >= 527 UNION ALL SELECT a2.currency, a2.is_active, a2.id FROM accounts AS a2 WHERE a2.balance <> 868 ORDER BY currency

SELECT a1.customer_id, a1.currency, a1.balance, a1.interest_rate FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.id >= 352 UNION SELECT a2.customer_id, a2.currency, a2.balance, a2.interest_rate FROM accounts AS a2 WHERE a2.interest_rate >= 410 LIMIT 29

SELECT l1.end_date, l1.interest_rate, l1.id FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.customer_id <= 332 UNION SELECT l2.end_date, l2.interest_rate, l2.id FROM loans AS l2 WHERE l2.term_months <= 259 ORDER BY end_date
SELECT c1.card_type, c1.card_number FROM cards AS c1 WHERE c1.credit_limit < 879 UNION SELECT c2.card_type, c2.card_number FROM cards AS c2 WHERE c2.expiry_date >= DATETIME('now', '-2 days')

SELECT l1.loan_type, l1.end_date, l1.monthly_payment, l1.interest_rate FROM loans AS l1 WHERE l1.end_date >= DATETIME('now', '-28 days') UNION SELECT l2.loan_type, l2.end_date, l2.monthly_payment, l2.interest_rate FROM loans AS l2 WHERE l2.end_date > DATETIME('now', '-11 days') ORDER BY loan_type

SELECT a1.is_active, a1.interest_rate, a1.customer_id FROM accounts AS a1 WHERE a1.id >= 583 UNION ALL SELECT a2.is_active, a2.interest_rate, a2.customer_id FROM accounts AS a2 WHERE a2.balance = 799 ORDER BY is_active LIMIT 38

SELECT t1.status, t1.amount FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.transaction_date < DATETIME('now', '-13 days') UNION ALL SELECT t2.status, t2.amount FROM transactions AS t2 WHERE t2.description LIKE '%a%' ORDER BY status LIMIT 41

SELECT t1.amount, t1.status, t1.to_account_id FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.amount >= 481 UNION SELECT t2.amount, t2.status, t2.to_account_id FROM transactions AS t2 WHERE t2.to_account_id < 174 ORDER BY amount LIMIT 11

SELECT c1.email, c1.is_active, c1.created_at, c1.first_name FROM customers AS c1 WHERE c1.phone = 'admin' UNION SELECT c2.email, c2.is_active, c2.created_at, c2.first_name FROM customers AS c2 WHERE c2.phone LIKE 'b%' ORDER BY email
SELECT b1.city, b1.is_active FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.state LIKE '%a%' UNION ALL SELECT b2.city, b2.is_active FROM branches AS b2 WHERE b2.state <> 'test' LIMIT 29

SELECT e1.hire_date, e1.first_name, e1.salary FROM employees AS e1 WHERE e1.position = '123' UNION ALL SELECT e2.hire_date, e2.first_name, e2.salary FROM employees AS e2 WHERE e2.hire_date > DATETIME('now', '-30 days') LIMIT 45

SELECT b1.is_active, b1.id, b1.city, b1.employee_count FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.name = 'admin' UNION ALL SELECT b2.is_active, b2.id, b2.city, b2.employee_count FROM branches AS b2 WHERE b2.is_active = 0

SELECT e1.id, e1.first_name, e1.position, e1.last_name FROM employees AS e1 WHERE e1.id > 243 UNION SELECT e2.id, e2.first_name, e2.position, e2.last_name FROM employees AS e2 WHERE e2.first_name <> 'user' ORDER BY id
SELECT c1.id, c1.account_id, c1.credit_limit FROM cards AS c1 WHERE c1.card_number LIKE 'b%' UNION ALL SELECT c2.id, c2.account_id, c2.credit_limit FROM cards AS c2 WHERE c2.account_id < 659

SELECT c1.card_number, c1.issued_on, c1.id FROM cards AS c1 WHERE c1.issued_on <= DATETIME('now', '-18 days') UNION ALL SELECT c2.card_number, c2.issued_on, c2.id FROM cards AS c2 WHERE c2.credit_limit > 879

SELECT c1.credit_limit, c1.card_number, c1.account_id, c1.expiry_date FROM cards AS c1 WHERE c1.account_id = 784 UNION SELECT c2.credit_limit, c2.card_number, c2.account_id, c2.expiry_date FROM cards AS c2 WHERE c2.issued_on >= DATETIME('now', '-20 days')

SELECT b1.is_active, b1.name, b1.state, b1.city FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.employee_count = 455 UNION SELECT b2.is_active, b2.name, b2.state, b2.city FROM branches AS b2 WHERE b2.manager_id <= 126 ORDER BY is_active
SELECT b1.state, b1.id, b1.name FROM branches AS b1 WHERE b1.employee_count > 816 UNION SELECT b2.state, b2.id, b2.name FROM branches AS b2 WHERE b2.state = 'activity'

SELECT t1.from_account_id, t1.status FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.status <> 'test' UNION SELECT t2.from_account_id, t2.status FROM transactions AS t2 WHERE t2.status LIKE '%c' ORDER BY from_account_id

SELECT t1.id, t1.description, t1.to_account_id, t1.from_account_id FROM transactions AS t1 WHERE t1.description = 'test' UNION ALL SELECT t2.id, t2.description, t2.to_account_id, t2.from_account_id FROM transactions AS t2 WHERE t2.description LIKE '%a%' ORDER BY id LIMIT 22

SELECT c1.account_id, c1.is_active, c1.expiry_date FROM cards AS c1 WHERE c1.card_number = 'admin' UNION ALL SELECT c2.account_id, c2.is_active, c2.expiry_date FROM cards AS c2 WHERE c2.id >= 213 ORDER BY account_id
